meta.title: Trend-gated selective harvest
meta.subtitle: Walk-forward covered-call overwrite vs fair buy-and-hold
meta.rule: Write only when name 63d return ≤ −10% and equal-weight market 63d ≤ 0; coverage = clip(−mom/0.15, 0.10, 1.0); OTM band; jump-to-expiry; ITM close-hold when gate clears.

protocol: Score dual-crash rules on IS only (med, basket, breadth, edge, material) on the core 16.
Freeze the top IS rule in wheel_bt/policy_tgsh.py.
Evaluate once on OOS and on the expanded 32-name holdout set — no re-pick.
